date: 2023-03-24
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan.fassett@gmail.com>
subject: Re: Meeting up today
msg_id: 18715019362f522a
---

No worries!

Yeah I head back down to LA tomorrow morning. Will need to come back up to
get a passport renewed at a consulate here soon, and probably back for work
within a couple of months as well.

Let me know anything re: Glystn raise, and happy to help with anything
related :)

---
date: 2023-03-24
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan.fassett@gmail.com>
subject: Meeting up today
msg_id: 18714618605f1645
---

Let me know what you’re thinking for today. I’m free any time after 1 or
so, and very flexible :)

---
date: 2023-03-23
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan@glystn.com>
subject: Re: Add a friend?
msg_id: 1870c2e2d6515cec
---

That’s fine, just text me when you get here or mention Jeremy from gfr at
the door

---
date: 2023-03-22
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan.fassett@gmail.com>
subject: Re: following up
msg_id: 1870b551bfd2bd72
---

Nice :) I think the party is mainly theirs and another company's, but
they're using our office so we're a partner in it basically.

Not sure about Mitch, I think it's more on the partnership/marketing side
of the business, but definitely wouldn't be surprised. He did just take
over as CRO, so he might be a bit swamped though

---
date: 2023-03-22
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan.fassett@gmail.com>
subject: Re: following up
msg_id: 1870aa95f3322160
---

Cool - you also should have just gotten your invite approved

---
date: 2023-03-22
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan.fassett@gmail.com>
subject: Re: following up
msg_id: 1870aa5a30df5b78
---

Weird - I pinged the organizer on that, but just text me when you're
getting close and I'll make sure you can get in - 4043126583

Friday afternoon works well for me :) usual meaning southern pacific? I'm
up for whatever! I've also been trying to find a time to link up with Idan,
I could invite him as well.

---
date: 2023-03-22
to: Wes Morton <wes@creativstrategies.com>
subject: Re: Matt and Wes - Samba
msg_id: 1870a9773c8ca13d
---

I think they have a demo table in the main area.

Yeah, they've raised 2 rounds, and have pretty major client deals, CEO was
formerly ML lead for Unity and CTO for SandboxVR, grew up in Cupertino, 3rd
company he's founded on. Some more info here:
https://medium.com/epoch-ml/introducing-epoch-75f1bcad2add

Looking forward to catching up!

---
date: 2023-03-22
to: Wes Morton <wes@creativstrategies.com>
subject: Re: Matt and Wes - Samba
msg_id: 1870a8aa8952a9e1
---

Perfect on both :)

If you see Epoch at the conference, say hi to Idan for me. They're working
on a AI/ML for game testing and ramping up their go to market - still very
much pre-marketing, but might be interesting to chat with them to lay some
groundwork (I think you've mentioned you do a fair amount of work around
gaming clients)

---
date: 2023-03-22
to: Wes Morton <wes@creativstrategies.com>
subject: Re: Matt and Wes - Samba
msg_id: 1870a8461532e2ae
---

Any chance we could do 15/30 minutes later tomorrow?

No real preference re: food - I've been doing keto recently so ideally on
the healthier side :)

---
date: 2023-03-21
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan.fassett@gmail.com>
subject: Re: following up
msg_id: 18705cdcedf46d1a
---

just following up on this - i'm still pretty much wide open Friday, or
could do afternoon coffee/drink Thurs

date: 2023-03-16
to: matthew.eisner@samba.tv
subject: timba press release draft
msg_id: 186e7ff50d2b859b
---

[Your Company Name] [Company Logo] [Date][Headline]: Timba Launches a
Revolutionary App to Help Users Take Control of Their Data and Earn Rewards
[City, State] - Timba, a leading data platform, announced today the launch of
their new app that will revolutionize the way users control and earn from their
data. The app will allow users to connect their TV, streaming, and other
accounts, and then build a blockchain-based ecosystem around a shared,
consumer-centric resource that puts users in control of their data.With Timba,
users will be able to earn rewards and get exclusive offers from their data,
while businesses will be able to access the depth, breadth, and accuracy of data
not previously possible. The app will provide businesses with access to data
that is both accurate and trustworthy, while also putting users in control of
their data."We're excited to launch Timba, an app that will revolutionize the
way users control and earn from their data," said Ashwin Navin, CEO of Timba.
"Our blockchain-based ecosystem will provide businesses with access to data that
is both accurate and trustworthy, while also putting users in control of their
data. We can't wait for you to try it out."The alpha version of the app is set
to launch in Q2 for the team, friends, and stakeholders. For early adopters,
Timba is offering exclusive rewards like NFTs. Users can visit [Link] to claim
their NFT and get early access to the alpha.Timba's app comes at a time when
users are looking for ways to take control of their data and businesses are
looking for ways to access trustworthy and accurate data. Timba's innovative
solution offers a win-win for both users and businesses.For more information,
visit [Link]Contact: [Your Name] [Your Phone Number] [Your Email]

---
date: 2023-03-16
to: matthew.eisner@samba.tv
subject: ashwin scripts
msg_id: 186e7fc48687783e
---

"At Timba, we believe that data is one of the most valuable resources in the
world. Yet, individuals have had little control over it, and businesses have
struggled to trust and utilize it effectively. With Timba, we're building an
ecosystem that empowers users to control their data and earn rewards from it,
while providing businesses with unprecedented access to high-quality data. We're
excited to announce the launch of our alpha in Q2 and look forward to bringing
the power of data back to the people."
We're really excited to launch Timba, an app that puts users in control of their
data. We believe that by giving users control over their data, we can create a
more equitable digital economy. Join us in this revolution and be a part of
something truly special.

We're excited to launch Timba, an app that will revolutionize the way users
control and earn from their data. Our blockchain-based ecosystem will provide
businesses with access to data that is both accurate and trustworthy, while also
putting users in control of their data. We can't wait for you to try it out.

---
date: 2023-03-15
to: Josh Stansfield <josh@joshstansfield.com>
subject: ai generated script
msg_id: 186e7b140f5763cd
---

[Opening shot of a person scrolling through their phone]Narrator: Today, we face
a problem.[Cut to a shot of a worried businessperson  typing on their laptop]
Narrator: Users don't control or earn from their data.[Cut to a shot of a
frustrated user looking at their phone]Narrator: Businesses are scared of
incoming regulation.[Cut to a shot of a skeptical businessperson  shaking their
head]Narrator: They don't trust data and can't get the data they need.[Cut to a
shot of a person smiling while using their phone]Narrator: But what if we told
you there's a utopian vision where users can earn, get rewarded, and get
exclusive offers from their data?[Cut to a shot of the Timba logo]Narrator:
Introducing Timba, the app that lets users connect their TV, streaming, and
other accounts.[Cut to a shot of a person using the Timba app]Narrator: We're
building a blockchain-based ecosystem around a shared, consumer-centric resource
where users can control their data, how it is used, and earn by it.[Cut to a
shot of a businessperson  nodding in agreement]Narrator: And businesses can get
access to depth, breadth, and accuracy of data not previously possible.[Cut to a
shot of the Timba team in their office]Narrator: Our alpha is launching in Q2,
exclusively for our team, friends, and stakeholders.[Cut to a shot of the Timba
website]Narrator: Visit the link below to claim an NFT and get early access to
the alpha and other early adopter rewards.[Closing shot of a person happily
using the Timba app]Narrator: Timba. Where your data works for you.

Hi,

I made a request for an appointment to get a new passport in the San
Francisco office, but was assigned an Atlanta one instead. Upon calling the
SF consulate, they instructed me to email this address to change my mailing
address (as I am no longer a resident at the address in Atlanta I
previously lived in that is on file for me) and to request the file be
transferred to the SF office (as my primary mailing address is in Los
Angeles now).

Please let me know how I should proceed/if we can initiate this process.

Best,

Matthew

---
date: 2023-03-07
to: Josh Stansfield <josh@joshstansfield.com>
subject: Re: Samba/Timba GDC Video
msg_id: 186be71d543939fd
---

Also maybe useful - a snippet we're sending around to potential
partners/advisors/investors:



TimbaVision allows users to connect their TV and streaming accounts to
create complete viewership history across multiple platforms. By choosing
to share their data with Timba and advertisers, users can earn rewards,
receive access to exclusive content, and enjoy a personalized experience
across their favorite streaming and content services.

Scheduled to launch in Q2/Q3 2023, TimbaVision beta will be available to
over 100 million Samba-enabled TV owners and hundreds of millions of
Netflix subscribers, with additional devices and services coming soon.
TimbaVision is part of the larger Timba Protocol ecosystem, a platform
enabling users to control and benefit from their data.

Timba has been incubated in stealth development by Samba TV for nearly a
year. We have onboarded an ecosystem of team members, advisors, and
partners from organizations like Disney, Coinbase, Stripe, Crunchyroll,
Algorand, BitTorrent, Yahoo, AWS, Reid Smith, US Bank, Raytheon, and many
other blockchain and corporate organizations alike in order to bring
products that are as user-friendly as possible to market.

With thousands of pre-launch signups already secured through a limited
private campaign, TimbaVision is seeking pilot partners who are interested
in delivering value to an opted-in audience in exchange for access to
unprecedented breadth, depth, and quality of customer data. We are also
welcoming technical and strategic partners and additional advisors who can
assist in our ongoing mission to build a sustainable, user-centric approach
to data

---
date: 2023-03-07
to: Josh Stansfield <josh@joshstansfield.com>
subject: Samba/Timba GDC Video
msg_id: 186bb2cfdb2159a1
---

Hey man,

Good talking to you earlier. I've linked some resources around the project
we're working on for you to scan.

https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1VrnhYt-wzAVuNx0XtTekKK3KzBBpZm7obJeHnpxCVIk/edit#slide=id.g17c05858708_0_27

https://www.figma.com/file/eymiYOrbteNcobUg86TUpo/TIMBA-MAIN?node-id=116%3A1811&t=SM2B9nSm4ePHDZda-0

https://docs.google.com/document/d/14Q3XuAN8g-eQs_Q7se5bB-vQwKjN6v6oAQRqwowuzls/edit#heading=h.v3n8enaq7e3e


As a super basic high level storyboard (although maybe this is too pitchy
I'm realizing reading through this):

   - 15 seconds: current problem where users dont control or earn from
   their data, businesses are scared of incoming regulation, don't trust data,
   can't get the data they need
   - 15 seconds: utopian vision where users earn, get rewarded, and get
   exclusive offers from their data
   - 15 seconds: Timba is building an app to let users connect their TV,
   streaming, and other accounts
   - 15 seconds: we'll then build a blockchain-based ecosystem around a
   shared, consumer-centric resource where users can control their data, how
   it is used, and earn by it, and businesses can get access to depth,
   breadth, and accuracy of data not previously possible
   - 15 seconds: alpha for team, friends, and stakeholders launching Q2
   - 15 seconds: visit this link to claim an NFT to get early access to the
   alpha and other early adopter rewards



Also, I did confirm with our CEO that he does have a good quality mic he
can use available.

Let me know if you have any thoughts or questions, and let's catch up
Thursday/Friday.

Matthew

---
date: 2023-03-07
to: gmuresan3@gmail.com
subject: Catching up
msg_id: 186b9ce3af1230ff
---

Hey man,

Hope your doing well!

Have some time to catch up this week? I’d love to run a couple of
blockchain projects I’m working on by you, maybe see if it would make sense
to bring you on as an advisor.

Let me know when might work for you,

Matthew

---
date: 2023-03-01
to: matthew.eisner@samba.tv
subject: Timba design feedback
msg_id: 1869f4f9712b7601
---

Like middle logo of Samba-ish set
Less bullet-ish
The T is a little bubbly/maybe play with it a little bit, an we play with
the T that's maybe less hard
TV box frame makes this look like pipes/plumbing
All lowercase version

Boxy version probably a bit too had/angular/busy - maybe a more simple
version?

Curvy T looks like kind of a wine opener, can we make it look less like a

---
date: 2023-02-24
to: matthew.eisner@samba.tv
subject: mvp options
msg_id: 18680e6e47ac7400
---

Current MVP: * What we're currently building for delivery by end of Q1, basic TV
   pairing and account creation, maybe 1 content carousel
 * Requirements
 * Test flight appAbility for user to create account (or sign up via Apple,
   Google (and Meta?))Ability for user to earn tokens during signupAbility for
   user to pair with a Samba TVAbility for user to earn tokens by pairing and
   each day of connectionBasic data collection/monetization preferences


For User Growth: * Goal is to drive/retain some early users/stakeholders at GDC
   and get them excited about the app, likely no pairing or content features in
   this version of the app
 * Requirements
 * Public version of the appField for user to enter their email and entry code
   Allow access only for those with correct entry codePush notification
   permissionScreen with message saying they earned from signing up
 * Other Notes
 * Would be good if possible to have some referral features, but
   okay if not


For Usability Feedback: * More similar to Current MVP than User Growth version,
   goal is to get user feedback in closed setting during GDC, no content
   features in this version of app
 * Requirements:
 * Download test flight version of app or public app with
   password gateCollect email address in app signupSet up 5-10 TVs in office
   during GDC for users to pair withUsers pair with TVs in office, processed
   accordingly on backend with ability to reward them for being early users
   laterCollect feedback from users using form in office or Google Form
 * Other Notes
 * We should likely look to integrate something like
   Appsee to be able to do session replays

---

date: 2023-02-16
to: lori@preferred411.com, support2@preferred411.com
subject: Re: P411 Application Status - Additional Information Required
msg_id: 1865a8a961e3ca58
---

Please find attached. Please note that most modern companies do not use
paystubs anymore, just documents like proofs of employment or W2s, as
payments are typically made via direct deposit. This image is a proof of my
employment and salary, and has substantially more personal information that
what is included in a typical paystub. I am also self employed and have a
company, so let me know if it would be easier to send the articles of
incorporation for that company, or to confirm via my company email address.

date: 2023-02-14

subject: Re: Intro: Matt & Alfred David re. Konnect Ventures CTO
msg_id: 1864e1913998e4f1

Hi Alfred,

I’m sorry, I just saw your email now. I live by my calendar, and never
received a calendar invite from you.

At the more macro level, I believe we are focusing more on fundraising at
the moment, as we’ve had a bit of initial traction.

We’ve put hiring a CTO on the back burner/are seeing what happens
serendipitously while we raise, so maybe it makes sense for us to loop back
with you when we’re making a more focused effort on that.

Best,

Matthew

Blockchain/Token

-Reward early adopters
-Facilitate private investment and strategic partners
-Incentivize employees and advisors

GTM Plan

Alternative Paths
-Airline style rewards points
-

date: 2023-02-13
to: Sam Cobbina <Sam@shieldaccountancy.co.uk>
subject: Annual Statement/P+L for Vang Capital + Advisory US Tax Filing
msg_id: 1864a9a6d8d6d290
---

Hi Sam,

Hope all is well.

I wanted to start a separate thread for this - it’s that time of year again
I need to get my US tax filing in order, and as you may remember they
require a basic summary of accounts/P+L for the previous calendar year of
all foreign businesses.

The Vang Capital statements have a hard deadline of 15 April (not
considering time it will take to process them), and my dad, who is a
shareholder, is unable to get an extension on this (whereas I may be able
to in the case of Vang Advisory, although ideally would not).

The Vang Advisory ones are only needed for my filing, not my dad’s, so
there is slightly less urgency around this.

Let me know if you need anything for me to get this done. It would be great
if we could have them by early/mid March.

Best,

Matthew

date: 2023-02-10
to: Kevin Gardner <Kevin@shieldaccountancy.co.uk>
subject: Re: Update/Catching up on payments
msg_id: 1863c1066727d54f
---

Thanks Kevin,

Also as a heads up, I will also need a basic year of 2023 P+L/annual
statement for my US tax filings for both companies by mid-March (with
extreme urgency around the Vang Capital accounts). I will follow up with
Sam on this, but it would be very nice to not miss this deadline as we have
the past 3 years.

For the Vang Capital accounts, when Antonio managed these, there was quite
a bit of work that needed to go in on my side to collect mark up estimates
on equity investments and crypto currency trade records (which at the time,
Antonio did not realize initially and led to a frantic last minute effort
to collect this info). I have asked a few times why we haven’t done this in
what seems like 2 years. All to say, I am worried we have not been doing
the full necessary accounting for Vang Capital since Antonio left.

On the Vang Capital admin side - in 2018, Vang Capital was given a loan
from my dad to provide funds to invest. This was paid back last year, but
we are planning to do another $100k top up on Vang Capital in the coming
weeks so that I can make 10 or so new investments in early stage startups.
Is there anything I need to consider when doing this? Happy to forward
along the promissory note agreement we’re planning to sign.

It would also be good if we can start towards the process of winding down
Vang Advisory. I have made a payment for the previous pending balance for
VAT, and am planning to do the same for corporation tax next week.

Let me know if there’s anything else.

Best,

Matthew

---
date: 2023-02-09
to: Dean Eisner <dean.eisner@gmail.com>
subject: Vang Capital contracts / FL Cleaner / Asia
msg_id: 186349c963e0c072
---

Hey - hope all is well in Spain

I'll give you a call tomorrow, but wanted to put some stuff here so it's in
one place for reference.


1) Vang Capital repayment note - I've attached this, signed by me, but
needs to be signed by you with a non-notary witness.

2) Vang Capital top-up - I've taken the previous various of the loan
agreement we had from Brian Leidel and Zach Buffington (not sure who he is)
and updated the date and terms. It looks like it only needs to be signed by
me, so let me know if you're okay with it and if so I can send bank details
and sign it.

3) Can you book a cleaner for a few days before you get back and let me
know when? I'm keeping the place clean but it would be good to have
someone do mopping/vacuuming/kitchen before you get back. Happy to pay for
this.

3a) for reference, is there a specific day per week that the person comes
to water your plants?

4) it looks like my dates for Asia will be April 30 to May 22. I think I'd
want to do India with more time, and I'll probably only have a week or 10
days, but where would you want to go?


Love,

Matthew

My dad and sister are actually both in Valencia at the moment I believe.

More than happy to jump on a call and discuss GTM, financing, governance,
etc. I'm in Florida the next few weeks, so sometime late afternoon/evening
your time would be best for me. Out of curiosity, what chains are you
planning to launch on? That can have a pretty big impact on where you can
get funding these days.

Looking forward to seeing how things are coming together!

Best,

Matthew

date: 2023-02-07
to: Ryan Donnelly <ryandonz@gmail.com>
subject: Cheqd vesting/catching up
msg_id: 186298e263ce49a6
---

Hey man,

Hope all is well with you.

Just wanted to ping you a note to see if there was another tranche of
tokens for cheqd that had been released.

Also, would love to catch up in general. I’m currently working on bringing
a zero-party data wallet play to market, and would love your take on it.
High level is basically Im working with former CEO of BitTorrent and former
CTO of crunchyroll to launch what will initially be a soft points reward
system like airline miles, but spinning out into a token once regulatory
environment in the US clears up a little bit (and once we have some
traction). We’re starting as an internal project at Samba.tv, which tracks
viewership and provides data to advertisers from 50m TVs, but will likely
spin out as a separate entity later this year.

I’d love any thoughts you have, as well as to pick your brain (or just hear
your musings) on the state of the market in general, but know you’re
probably quite busy. But let me know if you might have some time in the
coming weeks.

Best,

Matthew

---
date: 2023-02-03
to: matthew.eisner@samba.tv
subject: Spin out pros and cons
msg_id: 18618a2b0a2cda58
---

Pros:
Can be more aggressive with data collection
More strategic independence from Samba
Ability to incentivise advisors
First step towards risk insulation for token launch
Some shielding from liability for Samba
Ability to incentive Matthew/Brandon
Ability to secure funding or strategic investment


Cons:
Work to determine entity structure and relationship to samba
Legal costs to set up entity and contracts with samba
General admin and overhead cost/work (company setup, acct, finance,
oversight, HR, etc)
Would likely need to do more to prove independence than just set up
separate entities
Samba could neglect relationship
Might look a little weird from a sales standpoint
Difficult to incentivise stakeholders


Unsure:
We’d basically be cofounders
Distances Samba and Timba

---
date: 2023-02-03
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan.fassett@gmail.com>
subject: Re: lunch/coffee tomorrow?
msg_id: 1861843cbee89879
---

How’s 2.30pm?

I’m on a pretty strict diet these days, so I personally can’t drink beer,
but as long as they serve other alcohol too (or coffee) I’ll be able to
find something

Anywhere particular in mind? Also my phone number is (404) 312-6583 if it’s
easier to coordinate that way

---
date: 2023-02-03
to: Colin Allison <colin@konnectventures.co>, pawel@techtree.dev
subject: Reconnecting Colin/Paweł
msg_id: 18615c9717206458
---

Hey Paweł,

Hope all is well!

I think you probably remember Colin, my friend from SBC/Rainmaking? He is
working to set up a venture studio/fund/syndicates in SE Asia I’ve been
helping with a bit, and was curious about setting up a TechTree Branch for
the companies he’s working with. I’ll let him provide a bit more specifics.

Let’s catch up soon!

Matthew

---
date: 2023-02-03
to: Ethan Fassett <ethan.fassett@gmail.com>
subject: lunch/coffee tomorrow?
msg_id: 18614e869fa00d5d
---

Hey Ethan,
Hope all is well with you!
I've been in SF a few days for work with a super packed schedule and leaving
early Saturday, but happen to have a bit of a gap early/mid afternoon tomorrow.
I'd love to buy you lunch or a coffee and catch up if you might be
around/available. just let me know before noon or so and I can meet
you wherever 1pm or later.
Best,
Matthew

other biz dev15 minutes: pitch deck10 minutes: AOB

date: 2023-01-19
to: Alexander Guy <alexanderwguy19@gmail.com>
subject: Re: Curious your feedback on product I'm working on
msg_id: 185c816c7b9862b4
---

Hey man,
At this stage, we're just trying to find anyone who can help feedback on, poke
holes in, or validate the deck, whiitepaper, and tokenomics, so really any
feedback or questions or concerns that jump out at you are very valuable to us.
As per advising, this could be pretty light touch if you wanted (an
occasional intro, 1;1 call for feedback, and having name/photo in some materials
particularly the deck). We want to confirm a few friendlies and get some initial
feedback before we reach out to some more heavy hitters in our second wave of
outreach. so really, whatever works for you would likely be very agreeable for
us.
Want to maybe do a call sometime in the next few weeks and catch up?
Hope all is well!
Matthew

---
date: 2023-01-18
to: Guillaume Agis <guillaume.agis@gmail.com>
subject: Re: Any feedback
msg_id: 185c70bfb2b29be0
---

Thanks for the feedback :)

We've thought of both of these aspects actually:

Re: fraud, we're planning to limit people to a single device in the early
days. We're looking to implement some pretty heavy KYC requirements in our
v2, but if we find that we're seeing people gaming the platform, we'd
likely fast track this feature. We also aren't planning to introduce a
token or an on ramp/off ramp until Q3/4 of this year, which should give us
plenty of time to build mechanisms to identify and manage fraud accounts.

Re: values/encouraging negative behavior, this was one of the first things
we thought of when discussing potential downside/negative impact of the
product. "Watch-to-earn" is a bit of a misnomer, but probably is one of the
clearer ways we've found to communicate the gist of what the product will
look like in the early days. In reality, it will evolve into more of a
"share-your-data-to-earn" or a personal data wallet for end users. Users
will *not* actually earn anything based on how much time they spend
watching TV, they will be compensated a flat amount for each period of time
that their TV, other device, or various accounts are connected and
providing data to their account, so there is no incentive for them to watch
more TV. Furthermore, I personally consider companies abusing individual's
data to make money or advertise to them without sharing any value with
users to be a bigger and more solvable issue than people deciding to spend
more time consuming screens - at least a user can choose how much screens
to watch, they can't control what companies do with their data or share in
any of the value from that data. The main reason we're starting from TV and
streaming as opposed to other data sources is that 90% of advertising is
targeted based on what users watch (and our existing business/tech
capabilities are in that realm), but obviously we do need to be (and are
being very) careful about the behaviors we incentivize. But again, we are
not incentivizing users to watch more TV, just to connect their TV and
other accounts to collect their data and allow them to set preferences as
to how it is monetized (or to block its collection and
monetization entirely), and passively earn as long as that connection is
live and as a factor of how much they allow companies to use their data.

We're certainly open to suggestions on either of those points, but we are
definitely aware and have had quite a few discussions internally about both
potential for fraud and to encourage negative behaviour, and have a few
mechanisms in mind we'll play with to control each..

---

date: 2023-01-11
to: ali@gringaming.com
subject: Samba Farscape resources
msg_id: 1859e3635aa2ee0b
---

Hey man,

We're still just a working title, but find below some WIP information on
the project I'm working on (currently called Farscape). Any feedback,
thoughts, input, etc are greatly appreciated, and if it's interesting to
maybe get more involved (read: give you some tokens to put your name in the
deck and/or give a bit more feedback or a couple of intros or join on
periodic advisory board calls - it looks like we'll end up with a few big
names as advisors), let me know :)

Slide deck:
https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1VrnhYt-wzAVuNx0XtTekKK3KzBBpZm7obJeHnpxCVIk/edit#slide=id.p1

Whitepaper:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/14Q3XuAN8g-eQs_Q7se5bB-vQwKjN6v6oAQRqwowuzls/edit#heading=h.7z62yi6hd0or

Tokenomics Model:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xepBmlmMQpaQxxLXmSSmUZsbcm08fvNwcC59sChBISo/edit#gid=1700258651

We're planning to have branding together in the next few weeks, and then do
a private Alpha launch in mid-Feb, followed by a public beta in March or
April.

Matthew

date: 2023-01-10
to: Greg <howardegregory@gmail.com>
subject: Re: Referral to SF Consultant
msg_id: 1859ae75139cdbd2
---

Hi Greg,

I did ask around back on this a while back, but the couple of people I know
who really have the technical chops enough for me to recommend are all
working on full time stuff now. SFMC is always a tricky one too - at a
certain point, to me it's almost better to bring in a SF developer and work
to spec out the more marketing/product side for them to implement over
time. I've also had some decent success finding good developers on Turing
recently. I hope you were able to find someone to help on this though!


On a side note, I'd be very curious your take as to what I'm working on.
We're still just a working title, but find below some WIP information on
the project (currently called Farscape). Any feedback, thoughts, input, etc
are greatly appreciated, and if it's interesting to maybe get more involved
(read: give you some tokens to put your name in the deck and/or give a bit
more feedback or a couple of intros or join on periodic advisory board
calls - it looks like we'll end up with a few big names as advisors), I'd
love to discuss :)

Slide deck:
https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1VrnhYt-wzAVuNx0XtTekKK3KzBBpZm7obJeHnpxCVIk/edit#slide=id.p1

Whitepaper:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/14Q3XuAN8g-eQs_Q7se5bB-vQwKjN6v6oAQRqwowuzls/edit#heading=h.7z62yi6hd0or

Tokenomics Model:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xepBmlmMQpaQxxLXmSSmUZsbcm08fvNwcC59sChBISo/edit#gid=1700258651


Hope all is well and you had a good holiday!

Best,

Matthew

date: 2023-01-10
to: Christine Leuthold <christine@stonesoupripple.com>
subject: Re: Homeless project -
msg_id: 18599999d3fd1b20
---

Seems fine - it takes you a long time to get to the ask and its not really
clear what it is if there is any apart from get back to us to let you know
if you think this is cool. it sounded like it was a completed film in the
way you talk about it in the beginning but it sounds like it hasnt been
shot yet? you talk about how there are 40 people you'll follow, but the
only individuals you highlight are celebrities, might make sense to tease
what a couple of individual stories are.- or even flip the whole narrative
to start with an individual story and then zoom out to homelessness.
definitely a bit long

date: 2023-01-10

curious how it's structured and what your go to market will look like. I'm
frankly pretty content in my current role, so it's unlikely I'd leave for
something else, but if it's really a perfect fit then who knows - and
generally always happy to have a conversation.

I didn't see anything available in your calendar 'til the week of the 23rd,
so booked something then, but let me know if you'd prefer to do later this
week or next.

Best,

Matthew

date: 2023-01-09
to: Adrian <adriankpang@gmail.com>
subject: Following up on Samba Farscape
msg_id: 18598932039912b0
---

Hey man,

Was great to catch up last week.

We're still just a working title, but find below some WIP information on
the project I'm working on (currently called Farscape). Any feedback,
thoughts, input, people we should connect with, etc are greatly appreciated
-- and if it's interesting to maybe get more involved (read: give you some
tokens to put your name in the deck and/or give a bit more feedback or a
couple of intros or join on periodic advisory board calls - it looks like
we'll end up with a few big names as advisors), let's find a time to jump
on a call with our CEO Ashwin <https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashwinnavin/>.

Slide deck:
https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1VrnhYt-wzAVuNx0XtTekKK3KzBBpZm7obJeHnpxCVIk/edit#slide=id.p1

Whitepaper:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/14Q3XuAN8g-eQs_Q7se5bB-vQwKjN6v6oAQRqwowuzls/edit#heading=h.7z62yi6hd0or

Tokenomics Model:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xepBmlmMQpaQxxLXmSSmUZsbcm08fvNwcC59sChBISo/edit#gid=1700258651


We're planning to have branding together in the next few weeks, and then do
a private Alpha launch in mid-Feb, followed by a public beta in March or
April.

Matthew

---
date: 2023-01-09
to: nick@gringaming.com
subject: Samba Farscape resoucres
msg_id: 185988e9a819c7c3
---

Hey man,

We're still just a working title, but find below some WIP information on
the project I'm working on (currently called Farscape). Any feedback,
thoughts, input, etc are greatly appreciated, and if it's interesting to
maybe get more involved (read: give you some tokens to put your name in the
deck and/or give a bit more feedback or a couple of intros or join on
periodic advisory board calls - it looks like we'll end up with a few big
names as advisors), let's find a time to jump on a call.

Slide deck:
https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1VrnhYt-wzAVuNx0XtTekKK3KzBBpZm7obJeHnpxCVIk/edit#slide=id.p1

Whitepaper:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/14Q3XuAN8g-eQs_Q7se5bB-vQwKjN6v6oAQRqwowuzls/edit#heading=h.7z62yi6hd0or

Tokenomics Model:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xepBmlmMQpaQxxLXmSSmUZsbcm08fvNwcC59sChBISo/edit#gid=1700258651

We're planning to have branding together in the next few weeks, and then do
a private Alpha launch in mid-Feb, followed by a public beta in March or
April.

I'll text ya tmr to see if you're in the office, but let's catch up soon.

Matthew

date: 2023-01-09
to: Sam Cobbina <Sam@shieldaccountancy.co.uk>
subject: Re: Personal Tax Returns  -  2022
msg_id: 18597c260c3d9316
---

Hi Sam,

Thanks for this - I’ll review in the next day or so.

As per the balancing payment of 5k, is this net including the 3k or so I am
owed by HMRC from last year, or do I need to settle that separately/via a
call with HMRC?

Thanks,

Matthew
